headline: Incyte Sets Mid-Year Phase 3 Trial for CALR Antibody 989 as Pipeline Updates Roll Out
summary: Incyte (NASDAQ:INCY) Chief Medical Officer Steven Stein outlined the company’s development priorities across hematology, oncology and immunology, with a particular focus on its mutant CALR antibody 989, during a company news event. Stein said myeloproliferative neoplasms remain “front and center” f
